testsuite.name: com.pucetec.demo.services.StudentServiceTest

testcase.name: getStudentById falla cuando no encuentra registro()
createStudent guarda estudiante cuando el request es valido()
getAllStudents devuelve lista vacia sin registros()
updateStudent falla si el estudiante no existe()
deleteStudent elimina por id cuando existe()

testsuite.system-out: 23:56:50.055 [Test worker] INFO com.pucetec.demo.services.StudentService -- Creating Student Ana Mora 23:56:50.070 [Test worker] INFO com.pucetec.demo.services.StudentService -- Saved student with id 1 23:56:50.077 [Test worker] INFO com.pucetec.demo.services.StudentService -- Creating Student 23:56:50.114 [Test worker] INFO com.pucetec.demo.services.StudentService -- Getting all students 23:56:50.123 [Test worker] INFO com.pucetec.demo.services.StudentService -- Creating Student Ana Mora 23:56:50.125 [Test worker] WARN com.pucetec.demo.services.StudentService -- Attempted to register duplicate email: ana@puce.edu 23:56:50.134 [Test worker] INFO com.pucetec.demo.services.StudentService -- Getting all students
